calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: GAP-6 residue_coverage_pct / harm_benefit_ratio metric substrate validation
items.notes: infant_substrate:GAP-6 substrate-readiness diagnostic (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[]). Validates the new read-only ResidueField.get_coverage_telemetry() (residue_coverage_pct + harm_benefit_ratio). C0 both arms well-formed (coverage in [0,1], threshold==0.02*0.1, active<=n_centers), C1 ARM_1 (GAP-1 harm_gradient on) residue_coverage_pct strictly > ARM_0 (binary contact) by >= 0.01 margin, C2 benefit-terrain-off -1.0 sentinel both arms, C3 non-invasive (get_statistics intact, idempotent, weights unchanged -- protects EXQ-575), C4 ARM_0 has harm residue. Dry-run smoke 5/5 criteria PASS. Unblocks DEV-NEED-004 / DEV-NEED-008. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/infant_substrate_plan.md GAP-6.
